featured.title: Manage your agents remotely
featured.description: Run and manage agents on remote machines, built-in previewing of HTML and Mermaid diagrams, and terminal optimizations.

highlights.title: Learn VS Code
highlights.description: Build your skills with structured training modules with hands-on exercises and real-world examples.

highlights.title: AI core concepts
highlights.description: Get an overview of the core concepts and how AI agents work in VS Code.

highlights.title: Build and test with browser agent tools
highlights.description: Let AI build web apps and automatically verify them in the integrated browser, catching and fixing bugs on its own.
